name: Italy

authority.name: Ministero dell'Interno — CNSD (Carta d'Identità Elettronica)
authority.operator: Direzione Centrale per i Servizi Demografici (CNSD) / IPZS

source.note: CIE national root CAs (2016→2036 and 2024→2044) downloaded from the Ministero dell'Interno CIE Certification Authority portal and cross-checked against the AgID eIDAS Trusted List (TSL-IT.xml). Roots only; the two CIE issuing sub-CAs validate by chaining.

notes: Phase 1 covers the national eID (Carta d'Identità Elettronica) trust anchors only: the two self-signed Ministero dell'Interno / CNSD root CAs. Both were cross-checked against two independent sources (the CIE CA portal and the AgID national Trusted List). Italy's wider qualified-signature ecosystem is a federation of ~25 accredited QTSPs (Actalis, ArubaPEC, InfoCert, Namirial, Poste Italiane, Intesa, TI Trust Technologies, Uanataca, and others) published as ~222 active anchors in the AgID TSL; those are staged and deferred to a later phase pending TSL XAdES-signature verification (see scripts/monitors/PROMOTION.md, Strategy B), which is the correct control at that scale rather than per-certificate cross-checking.
